The '''Red Bull M.E.O. Season 6: India''' is a [[Battlegrounds Mobile India|BGMI]] tournament under the '''''Red Bull M.E.O.''''' series. Organized by '''[https://www.redbull.com/in-en/hubs/gaming/ Red Bull Gaming]''' in association with '''[https://nodwingaming.com/ NODWIN Gaming]'''.
